description: User clicks the 'New Tab' button in the browser to open a new page.
frame_description: The user is on the Askable Sessions page and moves the cursor to the top bar to open a new tab.

description: The browser navigates to the New Tab page.
frame_description: A new browser tab opens, displaying the Google search homepage.

description: User hovers the cursor over the Pinterest shortcut icon on the Google homepage.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the Pinterest shortcut on the Google homepage before moving to the search bar.

description: User clicks into the Google search bar to focus it for typing.
frame_description: The user clicks the central search bar on the Google homepage.

description: User types 'google flights' into the search bar.
frame_description: The text 'google flights' appears in the search bar as the user types.

description: Autocomplete suggestions dropdown appears below the search bar as the user types.
frame_description: A list of search suggestions appears dynamically as the user types 'google flights'.

description: The page navigates to the Google search results for 'google flights' after the user initiates the search.
frame_description: The browser transitions from the homepage to the search results page.

description: Search results content loads and renders on the page.
frame_description: The search results for 'google flights' become visible on the screen.

description: User hovers over the first search result link for 'Google Flights'.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the main title of the first search result.
